title: Nvidia supplier Wistron opens $700m Texas factory to build Grace Blackwell superchips
summary: Wistron, the Taiwanese contract manufacturer that builds server hardware for Nvidia, has opened its first factory on American soil, a $700 million plant in Fort Worth, Texas, that is already assembling Nvidia’s GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra superchips.
